name: gbrain
description: Personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search — GStack mod for agent platforms

skills.name: ingest
skills.description: Route content to specialized ingestion skills. Detects input type and delegates.

skills.name: query
skills.description: Answer questions using 3-layer search, synthesis, and citation propagation

skills.name: maintain
skills.description: Brain health checks: back-link enforcement, citation audit, filing validation, stale info, orphans, benchmarks

skills.name: enrich
skills.description: Enrich pages with tiered enrichment protocol, person/company page templates, and validation rules

skills.name: briefing
skills.description: Compile daily briefing with meeting context, active deals, and citation tracking

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Universal migration from Obsidian, Notion, Logseq, markdown, CSV, JSON, Roam

skills.name: setup
skills.description: Set up GBrain: auto-provision Supabase or PGLite, AGENTS.md injection, first import

skills.name: publish
skills.description: Share brain pages as beautiful password-protected HTML (code + skill pair, zero LLM calls)

skills.name: frontmatter-guard
skills.description: Validate and auto-repair YAML frontmatter on brain pages; gates against malformed YAML, missing closing ---, nested quotes, slug mismatches, null bytes

skills.name: signal-detector
skills.description: Always-on ambient signal capture. Fires on every message to detect original thinking and entity mentions.

skills.name: brain-ops
skills.description: Brain-first lookup, read-enrich-write loop, source attribution, ambient enrichment. The core read/write cycle.

skills.name: capture
skills.description: Single human-facing entrypoint for ingestion. Routes through put_page (local) or MCP (thin-client); replaces put-page-vs-commit-vs-autopilot confusion with one verb.

skills.name: idea-ingest
skills.description: Ingest links, articles, tweets, and ideas into the brain with analysis and entity cross-linking.

skills.name: media-ingest
skills.description: Ingest video, audio, book, screenshot, and repo content with entity extraction.

skills.name: document-ingest
skills.description: Ingest PDF, DOCX, Word, E-Mail, Excel, and CSV documents with OCR, auto-classification, and domain entity extraction.

skills.name: deadline-extract
skills.description: Extract dates and deadlines from ingested documents into timeline entries — extraction only, statutory period computation is flagged for human verification

skills.name: connector-ingest
skills.description: Connect external systems (Google Drive, Gmail, Notion, GitHub) and sync content into the brain with delta sync, OAuth2, and rate-limiting.

skills.name: meeting-ingestion
skills.description: Ingest meeting transcripts with attendee enrichment, entity propagation, and timeline merge.

skills.name: citation-fixer
skills.description: Audit and fix citation formatting across brain pages.

skills.name: repo-architecture
skills.description: Where new brain files go. Filing rules and directory conventions.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Create new skills following the conformance standard with MECE validation.

skills.name: daily-task-manager
skills.description: Task lifecycle: add, complete, defer, remove, review with priority levels.

skills.name: daily-task-prep
skills.description: Morning preparation with calendar context, open threads, and task review.

skills.name: cross-modal-review
skills.description: Quality gate via second model with refusal routing chain.

skills.name: cron-scheduler
skills.description: Schedule management with staggering, quiet hours, and wake-up override.

skills.name: reports
skills.description: Save and load timestamped reports with keyword routing for fast lookup.

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Skill validation framework: frontmatter, sections, manifest coverage, MECE checks.

skills.name: soul-audit
skills.description: 6-phase interactive interview generating SOUL.md, USER.md, ACCESS_POLICY.md, HEARTBEAT.md.

skills.name: webhook-transforms
skills.description: Convert external events into brain-ingestible signals with entity extraction.

skills.name: data-research
skills.description: Structured data research: search, extract, archive, deduplicate, track. Parameterized YAML recipes for investor updates, donations, company metrics.

skills.name: minion-orchestrator
skills.description: Unified Minions skill for deterministic shell jobs and LLM subagent orchestration. Submit, monitor, steer, pause/resume, replay. Replaces the older gbrain-jobs routing intent and sessions_spawn for durable observable background work.

skills.name: schema-author
skills.description: Evolve the active schema pack. Add page types, propose new types from a corpus scan, backfill page.type via sync. Wraps the 14 gbrain schema CLI verbs + 9 MCP ops shipped in v0.40.7.0.

skills.name: skillify
skills.description: Meta skill. Turn any raw feature into a properly-skilled, tested, resolvable, evaled unit. Paired with gbrain check-resolvable gives user-controllable auto-skill-creation.

skills.name: skillpack-check
skills.description: Agent-readable gbrain health report. Wraps doctor + apply-migrations --list into one JSON blob with exit codes. Cron-friendly for morning-briefing pipelines.

skills.name: skillpack-harvest
skills.description: Editorial workflow for lifting a proven skill from a host repo back into gbrain. Pairs with `gbrain skillpack harvest` CLI. Drives the genericization checklist that scrubs fork-specific names + real entities before files land in gbrain core.

skills.name: smoke-test
skills.description: Post-restart smoke tests + auto-fix for gbrain and OpenClaw environments

skills.name: gbrain-upgrade
skills.description: Keep gbrain current: act on the UPGRADE_AVAILABLE marker per self_upgrade.mode (notify prompt or silent auto)

skills.name: book-mirror
skills.description: Take any book (EPUB/PDF), produce a personalized chapter-by-chapter analysis with two-column tables: left = chapter summary, right = how it applies to you based on brain context. Output: brain page + PDF.

skills.name: article-enrichment
skills.description: Transform raw article text dumps in the brain into structured pages with executive summaries, verbatim quotes, key insights, why-it-matters, and cross-references.

skills.name: strategic-reading
skills.description: Read a book/article/case study through the lens of a specific strategic problem; produce an applied playbook (do/avoid/watch for) with short/medium/long-term recommendations.

skills.name: concept-synthesis
skills.description: Deduplicate and synthesize raw concept stubs into a tiered intellectual map (T1 Canon to T4 Riff), tracing idea evolution across sources over time.

skills.name: idea-lineage
skills.description: Trace one idea's evolution through the brain: first mention, best articulation, reversals, contradictions, abandoned branches, related concepts, and current live version.

skills.name: perplexity-research
skills.description: Brain-augmented web research via Perplexity plus Opus; surfaces what is NEW vs already-known about a topic by cross-referencing against the brain first.

skills.name: archive-crawler
skills.description: Universal archivist for personal file archives (Dropbox/B2/email exports). Filters for high-value content within an explicit gbrain.yml allow-list scan_paths gate.

skills.name: academic-verify
skills.description: Verify academic citations and research claims against current literature; routes through perplexity-research for the actual web search and formats results as a citation-checked brain page.

skills.name: brain-pdf
skills.description: Generate a publication-quality PDF from any brain page via the gstack make-pdf binary; strips frontmatter, sanitizes emoji, applies running headers.

skills.name: voice-note-ingest
skills.description: Ingest voice notes with exact-phrasing preservation (never paraphrased); routes content based on a decision tree across originals/concepts/people/companies/ideas/personal/voice-notes.

skills.name: cold-start
skills.description: Day-one brain bootstrapping: sequence the highest-leverage data sources (contacts, calendar, email, conversations, social, archives) to go from empty brain to useful brain. Uses ClawVisor for safe credential handling — agents never hold raw API keys.

skills.name: ask-user
skills.description: Reusable choice-gate pattern for presenting users with 2-4 options and stopping execution until they respond. Platform-agnostic (Telegram buttons, Discord, CLI, OpenClaw clarify tool).

skills.name: functional-area-resolver
skills.description: Compress an agent's routing file (RESOLVER.md or AGENTS.md) by replacing skill-per-row tables with functional-area dispatcher entries. Two-layer dispatch keeps every sub-skill reachable at ~50% of the file size.

skills.name: brain-taxonomist
skills.description: Filing gate consulted before every brain page write. Reads the active schema pack via `gbrain schema show --json`; emits a recommended filing path with reasoning.

skills.name: eiirp
skills.description: Everything In Its Right Place — post-work organizer. 7-phase audit: inventory, taxonomy, schema check (via cathedral CLI), file, skill graph audit, verify, report.

skills.name: schema-unify
skills.description: Migrate a brain off a noisy 24+-type pack onto gbrain-base-v2 (15 canonical types). 7-phase workflow: brain → assess → propose → apply → sync → verify → commit. Wraps the v0.41.22 unify-types PROTECTED Minion handler.

skills.name: skill-optimizer
skills.description: Self-evolving skill optimization via gbrain skillopt — SkillOpt-paper-grounded text-space optimizer with validation gating (median-of-3 + epsilon=0.05), bundled-skill safety, bootstrap review sentinel, per-skill DB lock, and atomic versioned writes.

skills.name: legal-brain
skills.description: Legal Brain dispatcher: case management, opponent analysis, strategy generation, and precedent search for legal professionals. Anonymizes all PII.

skills.name: pm-status
skills.description: Generate structured status reports for projects, cases, or initiatives. Pulls from brain pages, facts, and timeline.

skills.name: pm-task
skills.description: Task and action-item management for projects, cases, and initiatives. Creates, tracks, and completes tasks with deadlines and dependencies.

skills.name: project-onboard
skills.description: Onboard a new project into the brain: directory structure, seed pages, initial tasks, and connector wiring.

skills.name: legal-subsumption
skills.description: Legal subsumption: maps a fact pattern to applicable norms (Tatbestand -> Rechtsfolge) in Gutachtenstil for DE/AT/CH law. Cites paragraphs and case law; flags all output as attorney-review-required.

skills.name: contract-analysis
skills.description: Contract risk analysis: clause-by-clause risk matrix, red flags, missing standard clauses, AGB and DSGVO checks. Outputs overall risk rating with concrete amendment proposals.

skills.name: precedent-finder
skills.description: Finds controlling precedents (BGH, OGH, BFH, EuGH) from the brain corpus by legal issue or paragraph. Ranks binding over persuasive authority with Leitsatz and Az.

skills.name: aml-screener
skills.description: AML/KYC compliance screening against brain-indexed sanction lists, PEP categories, and risk criteria per GwG/FM-GwG/AMLD6. Outputs risk rating and required CDD/EDD steps with audit trail.

skills.name: brief-generator
skills.description: Generates German court brief drafts (Klageschrift, Klageerwiderung, Berufung, einstweilige Verfuegung) from case brain context in ZPO format. Drafts only - attorney review required.

skills.name: tax-ruling-lookup
skills.description: Analyzes tax notices (Bescheide) using the indexed tax corpus, computes Einspruch deadlines per AO, rates appeal prospects, and drafts Einspruchsschreiben.

skills.name: steuer-subsumption
skills.description: Tax subsumption (Tatbestand → Steuerfolge) over EStG/KStG/UStG/GewStG/AO (DE) and EStG/UStG/BAO (AT). Gutachtenstil with cited §§ and BFH/BFG case law; advisor-review-required.

skills.name: steuer-gestaltung
skills.description: Comparative tax-structuring options (Rechtsformwahl, Holding/§8b, Thesaurierung §34a, Umwandlung) with burden estimates and a § 42 AO substance-risk note. Advisory tool for tax professionals.

skills.name: umsatzsteuer-check
skills.description: VAT/USt compliance check: place of supply (§3a), Reverse-Charge (§13b), intra-Community supply (§6a), input VAT (§15), invoice fields (§14/14a) and e-invoicing mandate. Checklist + gap report.

skills.name: policy-review
skills.description: Broker-side insurance policy review: coverage scope, limits/sub-limits, deductibles and exclusions extracted with clause locations, risks flagged against the client situation. Not a binding coverage confirmation.

skills.name: claims-assist
skills.description: Broker-side claim support: checks the loss against the policy (sub-limits/deductible), surfaces the notification window, lists required documentation and drafts the carrier notification. The insurer adjudicates.

skills.name: coverage-gap-finder
skills.description: Finds coverage gaps / under-insurance across a client's book given a change (move, new assets, headcount), comparing active policies to the risk situation. Duty-of-care + cross-sell signal; advisory.

skills.name: eu-ai-act-inventory
skills.description: Maintains the EU AI Act inventory: classifies each AI system (prohibited / high-risk Annex III / limited Art.50 / minimal), lists obligations and flags missing evidence before 02.08.2026. Classification needs sign-off.

skills.name: control-effectiveness
skills.description: Assesses a GRC control's design + operating effectiveness against the obligation it covers (GDPR/AML/AI-Act/ISO), rates it with the evidence basis and lists remediation. The demonstrable-effectiveness record.

skills.name: lease-review
skills.description: Reviews a lease/tenancy: term, rent + escalation (Staffel/Index), deposit, break/renewal options, notice periods and repair obligations extracted with clause locations; risks flagged from the landlord/tenant position. Advisory.

skills.name: rent-roll-analysis
skills.description: Portfolio/rent-roll analysis from the leases in the brain: occupancy/vacancy, rent totals, WALT, lease-expiry timeline, arrears and tenant-concentration risk. Estimates to verify against the system of record.

skills.name: property-due-diligence
skills.description: Property purchase/sale due diligence: document checklist (Grundbuch, leases, encumbrances, permits, valuations), red flags cited to source, deal deadlines (exclusivity/LOI/closing). Deal-team support, not legal/tax advice.

skills.name: deal-memo
skills.description: Drafts an investment/deal memo from the brain's context (founder calls, deck, diligence) — structured, cited, with risks and open-question gaps. Decision support for the investment team, not advice.

skills.name: founder-tracker
skills.description: Founder/portfolio meeting prep: last contact, open commitments (both sides), what changed, suggested questions and a gap list — synthesized from calls/emails/notes with sources.

skills.name: portfolio-review
skills.description: Portfolio-wide review: each company's latest status, attention flags (runway, stale update, risk), follow-on/reserve signals. Advisory; figures as-reported by companies.

skills.name: proposal-finder
skills.description: Answers 'have we done this before?' — ranked past projects/proposals/reusable assets for a new opportunity, with learnings, sources and confidentiality/gap flags. Reuse support.

skills.name: project-retro
skills.description: Captures a project's institutional memory: what worked/didn't, reusable assets (with location), key learnings (sourced), filed as a learning page. Team validates.

skills.name: engagement-scoping
skills.description: Drafts an engagement scope/approach grounded in cited prior similar projects: objectives, workstreams, timeline, team, assumptions, risks. Draft, not a binding SOW.

skills.name: candidate-match
skills.description: Ranks candidates to an open role from the talent graph by explicit fit, with rationale, warm-intro paths and conflict/off-limits flags. Shortlist support; the consultant decides.

skills.name: pipeline-review
skills.description: Reviews the recruiting pipeline: each search's stage, stalled candidates, next actions and time-to-fill signals; flags searches at risk. Advisory; verify against the ATS.

skills.name: candidate-dossier
skills.description: Builds a candidate profile from the firm's interactions (history, strengths, motivations, comp, references) with sources; flags consent/off-limits. Validate before external submission.

skills.name: cost-calculator
skills.description: Calculates legal fee estimates per German RVG and Austrian RATG from the dispute value (Streitwert): court fees, attorney fees, settlement fees. Orientation only — never a binding fee calculation.

skills.name: datev-export
skills.description: Exports time entries and billing data in DATEV-compatible CSV/ASCII (Unternehmen Online, Rechnungswesen, Kanzlei-Rechnung). Supports USt-IdNr, Kostenstellen, mandate-based grouping.

skills.name: deadline-templates
skills.description: Computes statutory deadlines from templates across 7 jurisdictions (DE/AT/CH/EU/US/UK) with 27+ deadline types, holiday exclusion and weekend push-forward. Every result is flagged for human verification.

skills.name: dsgvo-compliance
skills.description: Checks data processing activities for GDPR/DSGVO compliance: legal bases, data subject rights, documentation duties, breach notification. Produces a compliance checklist and gap report (DE/AT/EU).

skills.name: kollisionspruefung
skills.description: Conflict-of-interest check per § 43a BRAO: scans brain cases for entities appearing as both client and opposing party. Reports severity and recommended action — never replaces the attorney's own duty to check.

skills.name: legal-beweislage
skills.description: Analyzes the evidence situation of a case: strengths/weaknesses, gaps, admissibility, gathering recommendations. Produces a weighted evidence-board summary with source verification.

skills.name: legal-normen
skills.description: Finds and interprets legal norms (statutes, regulations) for a legal question, cross-referenced with case law. Supports DE, AT, CH, EU.

skills.name: legal-strategie
skills.description: Generates litigation strategy recommendations from the case's facts, claims, defenses, evidence, and opponent profile: procedural tactics, risk assessment, next steps. Tool for the attorney, not authoritative advice.

setup.description: Auto-provision Supabase or PGLite and configure GBrain (< 2 min)
